ogTitle: Crangan Bay vs Craven Plateau: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crangan Bay and Craven Plateau.
heading: Crangan Bay vs Craven Plateau — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crangan Bay, New South Wales and Craven Plateau, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crangan Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Craven Plateau (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crangan Bay or Craven Plateau safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crangan Bay has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Craven Plateau scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crangan Bay scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Craven Plateau scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crangan Bay or Craven Plateau?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crangan Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
